hero.title: GIANLIVIO IEMOLO
hero.desc: I develop and integrate complex e-commerce systems. I automate processes, connect APIs, and optimize performance. With a Master’s degree in Semiotics, I bring an analytical approach to the structure of code and interfaces.

stats.desc: Active e-commerce catalogue on shop.puntoluce.net. 13,102 categories, 300+ suppliers, real-time updates.

automations.title: AUTOMATIONS & INTEGRATIONS
automations.subtitle: API integrations, automations and tracking built for shop.puntoluce.net

items.title: Open2B ↔ Brevo contact sync
items.desc: Bidirectional flow between e-commerce platform and email marketing. 60,000+ contacts synced with automatic B2B/B2C segmentation. Real-time webhooks for subscriptions and cancellations, rate limiting and retry handling.

items.title: GDPR & Consent Mode v2
items.desc: Consent layer with Cookiebot and Consent Mode v2. Pre-consent cookie blocking, full GTM audit trail. Compliance verified via Network tab across all active tags.

items.title: GA4 / GTM tracking
items.desc: Full GA4 e-commerce event setup: view_item, add_to_cart, purchase. Facebook Pixel with url_passthrough. Microsoft UET Enhanced Conversion. Debugging via GTM preview and Network tab.

items.title: Open2B e-commerce template
items.desc: Full theme development on Open2B/Scriggo: mobile-first structure, dark mode, multi-step checkout, AJAX dynamic filters, product cards with badges, SKU and real-time availability.

items.title: European VAT validation
items.desc: Unified API Cerved (IT) + VIES (EU) for VAT number verification across 28 countries. Filesystem cache, smart soft-fail, auto-fill of company data at checkout. Hard-blocking on invalid VAT.

items.title: B2B / B2C customer segmentation
items.desc: Automatic classification via VAT number presence and Tax Area. Webhook-driven on Open2B, routing to IT/EU/Non-EU fiscal groups without manual intervention.

items.title: Performance optimisation
items.desc: LCP from 12s to 4s on mobile via lazy-loading, preload, deferred JS, forced-reflow elimination. TBT reduced by 40%. Mobile-first CSS refactoring: 15,000 lines reduced to 10,000, centralised utilities.

items.title: Logistics KPIs — delivery times
items.desc: Internal dashboard calculating mean, median and P90 on real delivery times by courier and geographic area. Batch processing on 1,000+ orders/step. Chart.js charts with country and province filters.

items.title: OAuth 2.0 social login
items.desc: Login and registration via Google Identity Services (client-side JWT) and Facebook SDK v18.0. Secure handling of three scenarios: new user, existing account, linking a pre-existing account.

items.title: Product sync to Brevo
items.desc: 23,550 products synced from Open2B to Brevo eCommerce. Batches of 100 SKUs per call, real-time webhooks for create/update/delete, automatic 429 rate limiting management.

items.title: Kelkoo and Trovaprezzi feeds
items.desc: XML feed generation for Kelkoo IT/FR and Trovaprezzi. Server-side availability filters, shipping cost calculation by weight, UTM parameters for conversion tracking. Automatic updates.

items.title: 20+ active integrations
items.desc: Brevo, Feedaty, Kelkoo, Trovaprezzi, Doofinder, Cerved, VIES, DocFinance, Facebook Graph API, Google Identity. Automatic retry, rate limiting, intelligent fallback, JSON logs for every webhook.

items.title: Dark mode — CSS variable system
items.desc: Dark mode via CSS custom properties and localStorage. Dynamic toggle without reload, data-theme variables applied to root. Session persistence. Smooth transitions across 200+ components.

items.title: Product search with server-side filters
items.desc: Search proxy with isolated Shadow DOM. Manufacturer, department and price filters processed server-side. Client-side exclusion of obsolete departments. Dedicated responsive overlay, live Open2B data reconciliation.

highlights: Development and management of shop.puntoluce.net (51,240 SKUs, 13,102 categories)
Implementation of 20+ API integrations (Open2B, Brevo, GTM, GA4, Feedaty, Kelkoo, Trovaprezzi)
Performance optimization: Lighthouse 40→80 (+100%), LCP 12.3s→3.4s (-72%)
Unified VAT validation system (VIES EU + Cerved IT) for 28 countries
Brevo marketing automation: 60k+ contacts sync with bidirectional webhooks
GDPR compliance implementation (Cookiebot + Consent Mode v2)
Mobile-first CSS refactoring: 15k→10k lines, centralized utilities
Intensive 600+ hour bootcamp: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Vue.js, PHP, Laravel, MySQL
Team projects: Spotify replica (Vue.js), Deliveboo clone (Laravel + Vue)
Collaborative Git workflow and Agile/Scrum methodology
Full-stack application deployment on Linux servers
SEO-oriented copywriting for e-commerce and corporate websites
Technical blog content and product guide creation
Meta description and title tag optimization for organic ranking
Digital Copywriter Certificate - Società Dante Alighieri (2022)
Semiotics and Philosophy of Language (110/110 summa cum laude)
Thesis: "Semiotics applied to digital interface analysis"
Structural analysis of complex signification systems
Formal logic, semantics and pragmatics of language
Philosophy (110/110 summa cum laude)
Focus: Logic, Philosophy of Language, Epistemology
Research methodology and critical thinking
Textual, argumentative and rhetorical analysis
